title: Ciy`a' #5517
definition:
Sia or Siaha = "departing"

 1) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Sia or Siaha = "departing"

 1) ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  father of some returning exiles
